caption: A person's hands are seen manipulating a stack of yellow cards atop a white base on a table covered with a colorful cloth featuring palm tree designs. In the background, a man wearing a black shirt sits at a desk with a computer monitor. The logo "JASPYS" and the text "CASEBREAKS.COM" appear in the upper right of the scene. In the initial frames, the person's hands are shown arranging and lifting the yellow cards. As the sequence progresses, a single baseball card featuring an image of Randy Johnson is pulled from the stack and held up for the viewer to see. The card's text reads "RANDY JOHNSON" at the bottom. The scene transitions from the general handling of the card stack to a close-up focus on the specific player card, while the man in the background remains seated.
